heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly sunny after any early fog. Breezy, with highs in the low to mid 80s. Southwest winds gusting to 20 mph, except gusting to 35 mph near the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Fair early; increasing clouds late. Slight chance of a light shower far north before morning. Lows from the mid 50s to around 60. West to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph early.

heading: Wednesday
text: Variable clouds. Slight chance of a shower around Route 4. Highs from upper 70s to mid 80s in the south, and mid 70s to near 80 north, with some lower 70s far north and west. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.
